title: Databricks ODBC Driver renamed from Simba Spark ODBC Driver
body: The Databricks ODBC driver has been renamed from Simba Spark ODBC Driver to Databricks ODBC Driver. Existing Simba driver versions remain supported for two years. See [Migrate from Simba Spark ODBC Driver to Databricks ODBC Driver](/aws/en/integrations/odbc/migration) for instructions on updating your connections.

ref_links.text: Migrate from Simba Spark ODBC Driver to Databricks ODBC Driver
